comparison.rootCause: The same six failures reproduce with the same actual values in the frozen 0.11.7 runtime and the 0.12.0 Laboratory implementation when both run in the same clean Playwright profile. The Laboratory implementation is not the cause; the previous 0.11.7 browser evidence is not reproducible in this clean verifier.
comparison.recommendedFix: Make the deterministic scenario setup self-contained for a clean browser profile, especially Energy/Lepidoptera unlock state for R2/R3 and forced meat-plan runtime availability for R8. Do not change Laboratory snapshot logic.
